display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
No isolate, no WASM instance.
DurableObject identity + SQLite persist.
engine.wasm not yet instantiated.

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rust DurableObject (workers-rs) instantiates
rquickjs engine.wasm (QuickJS-ng, wasm32-wasip1).
In-VM JS bootstrap (host Proxy + Date trap, ~40 lines).
config persisted: clock / rngSeed / capture / cellBudget / fetch / tools.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rust DO drives eval; effects fire once.
TICK-BUDGET TRIPWIRE: interrupt callback
decrements per invocation -> typed
TimeoutError on runaway loop (socket alive).
Mid-cell used-heap tripwire guards alloc bombs.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SIZE-ADMISSION guard on QuickJS used-heap
(memoryUsedSize), not monotonic buffer.
W5 used-heap admission + arena scrub.
W4 256B byte-delta vs prior image.
E6 oplog crash-tail + engine-migration journal.
SQLite-first; R2 (engram-snapshots) overflow only.

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DO evicted: in-memory namespace + WASM
instance gone. Snapshot durable in SQLite
(manifest: used_heap, kv_json) / R2 if large.
No alarms in-flight (facet constraint).

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
New rquickjs instance; pre-size memory.
Tier-0 native extensions re-instantiated at
fixed bases, THEN blit WASM linear memory back.
RESTORE guard admits on recorded used_heap.
NO REPLAY: live state resumes verbatim.
kv state + config re-hydrated; generation bumps.
